reviews.review_title: It's cool, especially for its price.
reviews.review_description:
I haven't played it very much, but it seems to have some pretty cool features that the other sandboxes don't inherently have. With enough modding and tweaking, I think you can get the other games, like bone lap, to have these features, like riding bikes, scooters, etc, but some of that modding and downloading, is tedious, so I feel like these different sandbox games have their own selling point.

I like the way this one has skateboards, dirt bikes, etc.

I like the guns, levels avatars and physics engine (Marrow engine) for Bonelab.

I like the ease of use of downloading and applying mods in the ability to play with others, in Beyond sandbox.

I've messed with a few of the in-game mods on Project Third Eye, but I haven't gotten around to seeing if and how you download and apply new mods.

It's a fun game, but it's not working right. To fix it, go to the mobile app, scroll down to 𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡, click on it, and switch it from 𝗟𝗜𝗩𝗘 to 𝗕𝗘𝗧𝗔 (this should be in the 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 Section down at the bottom)

reviews.review_title: Awesome game just buy it. Keep in mind..
reviews.review_description: This game is really cool, almost like Newton’s playground just better graphics, and overall physics feel, really love how integrated all the different vehicles and interactions are, like the fact that you can do snowboarding, skiing, skateboarding, scootering and all sorts of other extreme sports type things is really cool to me. However, it feels like the game has kind of been abandoned by the developer? Not necessarily that the game is trashy, it’s just I don’t see any updates and there’s no multiplayer which can get a little boring at times but also I feel like the maps are a little small, although I do understand that they take a lot to run, especially on the quest two. Speaking of which, to all the people saying that the game keeps crashing on “low memory “on their quest two. This game was optimized for the quest three and 3S processors not the quest two. I bought this game when I had a quest two, and I had to load it several times before it would stop saying low memory and crashing. about a week later when I got a quest three the game performed beautifully with no loading issues. It’s just your headset. Overall, the game is very fun. The vehicles are awesome and the graphics are pretty dang good definitely recommend, I just hope it gets some updates in the future.

I have ideas for an update:
1: mods
2: avatars
3: animals
4: mechs
5: and challenges
